scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[1] Null predicate takes precedence over comparison operator [null1=NOT NULL, comp==, null2=NULL, right=false, wrong=true]
scenarios.description: [1] Null predicate takes precedence over comparison operator [null1=NOT NULL, comp==, null2=NULL, right=false, wrong=true]
scenarios.query:
RETURN null IS NOT NULL = null IS NULL AS a,
       (null IS NOT NULL) = (null IS NULL) AS b,
       (null IS NOT NULL = null) IS NULL AS c

scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[1] Null predicate takes precedence over comparison operator [null1=NULL, comp=<>, null2=NULL, right=false, wrong=true]
scenarios.description: [1] Null predicate takes precedence over comparison operator [null1=NULL, comp=<>, null2=NULL, right=false, wrong=true]
scenarios.query:
RETURN null IS NULL <> null IS NULL AS a,
       (null IS NULL) <> (null IS NULL) AS b,
       (null IS NULL <> null) IS NULL AS c

scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[1] Null predicate takes precedence over comparison operator [null1=NULL, comp=<>, null2=NOT NULL, right=true, wrong=false]
scenarios.description: [1] Null predicate takes precedence over comparison operator [null1=NULL, comp=<>, null2=NOT NULL, right=true, wrong=false]
scenarios.query:
RETURN null IS NULL <> null IS NOT NULL AS a,
       (null IS NULL) <> (null IS NOT NULL) AS b,
       (null IS NULL <> null) IS NOT NULL AS c

scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[2] Null predicate takes precedence over boolean negation
scenarios.description: [2] Null predicate takes precedence over boolean negation
scenarios.query:
RETURN NOT null IS NULL AS a,
       NOT (null IS NULL) AS b,
       (NOT null) IS NULL AS c

scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=null, op=AND, truth2=null, null=NULL, right=null, wrong=true]
scenarios.description: [3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=null, op=AND, truth2=null, null=NULL, right=null, wrong=true]
scenarios.query:
RETURN null AND null IS NULL AS a,
       null AND (null IS NULL) AS b,
       (null AND null) IS NULL AS c

scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=null, op=AND, truth2=true, null=NULL, right=false, wrong=true]
scenarios.description: [3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=null, op=AND, truth2=true, null=NULL, right=false, wrong=true]
scenarios.query:
RETURN null AND true IS NULL AS a,
       null AND (true IS NULL) AS b,
       (null AND true) IS NULL AS c

scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=false, op=AND, truth2=false, null=NOT NULL, right=false, wrong=true]
scenarios.description: [3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=false, op=AND, truth2=false, null=NOT NULL, right=false, wrong=true]
scenarios.query:
RETURN false AND false IS NOT NULL AS a,
       false AND (false IS NOT NULL) AS b,
       (false AND false) IS NOT NULL AS c

scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=null, op=OR, truth2=false, null=NULL, right=null, wrong=true]
scenarios.description: [3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=null, op=OR, truth2=false, null=NULL, right=null, wrong=true]
scenarios.query:
RETURN null OR false IS NULL AS a,
       null OR (false IS NULL) AS b,
       (null OR false) IS NULL AS c

scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=true, op=OR, truth2=null, null=NULL, right=true, wrong=false]
scenarios.description: [3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=true, op=OR, truth2=null, null=NULL, right=true, wrong=false]
scenarios.query:
RETURN true OR null IS NULL AS a,
       true OR (null IS NULL) AS b,
       (true OR null) IS NULL AS c

scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=true, op=XOR, truth2=null, null=NOT NULL, right=true, wrong=false]
scenarios.description: [3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=true, op=XOR, truth2=null, null=NOT NULL, right=true, wrong=false]
scenarios.query:
RETURN true XOR null IS NOT NULL AS a,
       true XOR (null IS NOT NULL) AS b,
       (true XOR null) IS NOT NULL AS c

scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=true, op=XOR, truth2=false, null=NULL, right=true, wrong=false]
scenarios.description: [3] Null predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator [truth1=true, op=XOR, truth2=false, null=NULL, right=true, wrong=false]
scenarios.query:
RETURN true XOR false IS NULL AS a,
       true XOR (false IS NULL) AS b,
       (true XOR false) IS NULL AS c

scenarios.id: Precedence4 - On null value-[4] String predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator
scenarios.description: [4] String predicate takes precedence over binary boolean operator
scenarios.query:
RETURN ('abc' STARTS WITH null OR true) = (('abc' STARTS WITH null) OR true) AS a,
       ('abc' STARTS WITH null OR true) <> ('abc' STARTS WITH (null OR true)) AS b,
       (true OR null STARTS WITH 'abc') = (true OR (null STARTS WITH 'abc')) AS c,
       (true OR null STARTS WITH 'abc') <> ((true OR null) STARTS WITH 'abc') AS d
scenarios.skip_reason: runtime: STARTS WITH function not implemented
